subject: Cloud Computing
title: Cloud as AI's Engine Room
description: A 60-second lesson on Cloud as AI's Engine Room.

hook.text: Training GPT-4 required thousands of GPUs running for months. Without the cloud, modern AI simply wouldn't exist.

buildup.text: AI training needs massive parallel computing. Cloud providers offer GPU clusters no single company could afford to own.

discovery.text: AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud offer specialized AI chips: A100 GPUs, TPUs, and custom silicon for training and inference.

twist.text: The AI boom has created GPU shortages. Cloud GPU instances sell out months in advance. AI is straining cloud capacity.

climax.text: Cloud and AI are now inseparable. AI needs cloud scale, and cloud providers need AI workloads to fill data centers.

punchline.text: No cloud, no AI revolution. They need each other.

quiz.question: Why is the cloud essential for modern AI development?
options: AI training requires massive GPU clusters that individual companies cannot afford to own
AI algorithms can only run on cloud provider software
Cloud providers have exclusive patents on all AI technology
